2025-26 Orlando Magic Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 45-37, Finished 8th in NBA Eastern Conference

Coach: Jamahl Mosley (45-37)

Executive: Jeff Weltman

PTS/G: 115.7 (15th of 30) Opp PTS/G: 115.1 (13th of 30)

SRS: 0.81 (17th of 30) Pace: 100.0 (12th of 30)

Off Rtg: 114.9 (19th of 30) Def Rtg: 114.3 (11th of 30) Net Rtg: +0.6 (17th of 30)

Expected W-L: 43-39 (17th of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +1800, Over-Under 51.5

Arena: Kia Center Attendance: 768,906 (12th of 30)

NBA 2026 Playoffs:
Lost NBA Eastern Conference First Round (3-4) versus Detroit Pistons  (Series Stats)

Triple-Doubles

Triple-Doubles The NBA did not track Triple-Doubles until 1979-80 when Magic Johnson popularized the feat. Nonetheless, we can present Triple-Doubles since 1950-51 when rebounds became an official statistic. A small number may yet be unaccounted for but we're confident in the completeness of the list.
